login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Sign in to manage your appointments, results and favourites.
login.demoHint: Any seeded email signs in — try {email}. The password isn't checked, so use anything with 6+ characters.

register.title: Create your account
register.subtitle: Book doctors, labs and scans across Egypt in under a minute.
register.terms: I agree to the <terms>Terms of Service</terms> and <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy>.
register.created: Account created — let's verify your number.

verify.title: Verify your number
verify.sentTo: We sent a 6-digit code to {destination}. Enter it below to activate your account.
verify.resent: A new code is on its way.
verify.demoHint: This is a demo — the code is always {code}

forgotPassword.title: Reset your password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter the email on your account and we'll send you a 6-digit code.
forgotPassword.sent: If an account exists for that email, a code is on its way.
forgotPassword.unavailableTitle: Password reset isn't available in demo mode
forgotPassword.unavailableBody: This build runs against the seeded demo dataset, which has no passwords to reset. Set NEXT_PUBLIC_API_MODE=live to use the real MedPoint account system.

resetPassword.title: Enter your code
resetPassword.subtitle: We sent a 6-digit code to {email}. Enter it below and choose a new password.
resetPassword.done: Password updated — you can sign in now.
resetPassword.resent: A new code is on its way.
resetPassword.missingEmail: Start by telling us which account to reset.

changePassword.title: Password
changePassword.description: Change the password you use to sign in.
changePassword.demoNotice: Password changes need the live MedPoint account system. This build is running against the seeded demo dataset.

roleSwitcher.title: Explore as…
roleSwitcher.footnote: Signs you straight in with a seeded account for that role.

errors.nameTooLong: That name is a little too long.
errors.invalidPhone: Enter a valid Egyptian mobile number, e.g. 01012345678.
errors.acceptTerms: You must accept the terms to continue.
